children.text: AdWall Support
FAQ
Offer History
Support
I completed an offer and never received my credits. Can you help?
If for some reason you didn't receive credits upon completion of an offer, please contact support.
How do I redeem my credits?

To redeem earned credits, please follow the credit redemption instructions that are listed by the creator of this app. If credit redemption instructions arent available, please contact the creator of this app directly.
How quickly do I receive my credits?
Most offers will credit within 45 minutes. If you haven't received credits after 24 hours, you may contact support.
Why did I lose credits?

Loss of credits on a particular offer can occur if the advertiser listed on a completed offer has determined that earned credit to be unqualified. If you feel that the loss of credit was due to an error, please contact support.
An offer that I have seen before is missing. How can I find it?

If you are not able to find a particular offer via the featured offers or specific category filter, the offer may be unavailable due to your geographic location, prior offer completion, technical issue or other display related issues. Our offer inventory does constantly change, so the offer may return at a later date.
How do I complete an offer?
To complete an offer, simply follow the instructions listed in the description of the offer.
Select a Subject
Has it been 24 hours since you completed the offer?
No
Yes
What date was the offer completed?
MM/DD/YY
We are unable to provide assistance with crediting until at least 24 hours have passed since completing an offer
SEND
